tossups.question: Robert Rosenblum argued these objects are anthropomorphized as female nudes in still lifes with fruit bowls. A barkeep holds one of these objects in a painting of its artist drinking absinthe with Germaine Pichot [Zher-MEN Pe-SHOW], At the Lapin Agile [A-ZHEEL]. Infrared analysis of a painting with one of these objects showed it was painted over a work of a mother and child with a small calf. An artist represented himself as a harlequin holding one of these objects in a painting with a pierrot and a monk holding (*) sheet music. Four of these objects appear on a wall and in the arms of two men in the background of John Singer Sargent’s El Jaleo. The artist of Three Musicians painted a blind man with one of these objects sitting cross-legged during his Blue Period. For 10 points, Pablo Picasso painted an old beggar playing what musical instrument?
tossups.question_sanitized: Robert Rosenblum argued these objects are anthropomorphized as female nudes in still lifes with fruit bowls. A barkeep holds one of these objects in a painting of its artist drinking absinthe with Germaine Pichot [Zher-MEN Pe-SHOW], At the Lapin Agile [A-ZHEEL]. Infrared analysis of a painting with one of these objects showed it was painted over a work of a mother and child with a small calf. An artist represented himself as a harlequin holding one of these objects in a painting with a pierrot and a monk holding (*) sheet music. Four of these objects appear on a wall and in the arms of two men in the background of John Singer Sargent's El Jaleo. The artist of Three Musicians painted a blind man with one of these objects sitting cross-legged during his Blue Period. For 10 points, Pablo Picasso painted an old beggar playing what musical instrument?
tossups.answer_sanitized: guitars [accept The Old Guitarist, prompt on instruments]

tossups.question: In collaboration with Aldo Crommelynck, David Hockney framed this painting with pink-tinted sketches for a set of illustrations of a poem it inspired. Infrared and X-ray imaging of this painting’s right side uncovered a cow or bull licking the head of a calf. That study also revealed that this painting’s original subject was similar to a sketch that its artist sent to Max Jacob of a young mother and child. Like its artist’s La Vie, this painting was created in response to the suicide of Carles Casagemas (“KAR-luss kuh-suh-ZHEM-us”). El Greco’s style informed the elongated appearance of this painting’s title person, who sits cross-legged and leans against a wall. For 10 points, name this painting of a blind, aged street musician, a Blue Period work of Pablo Picasso.
tossups.answer: The Old Guitarist (The Hockney work is titled The Blue Guitar: Etchings By David Hockney Who Was Inspired By Wallace Stevens Who Was Inspired By Pablo Picasso.)

packet.name: A - Columbia A and Texas A

tossups.answer_sanitized: The Old Guitarist (The Hockney work is titled The Blue Guitar: Etchings By David Hockney Who Was Inspired By Wallace Stevens Who Was Inspired By Pablo Picasso.)

bonuses.leadin: Ted thinks there should be fve Picasso questions for every question on the Pre-Raphaelites, so let’s work our way to that next William Holman Hunt tossup by answering these questions on Picasso. For 10 points each:
parts: Picasso was inspired by the suicide of his friend Carlos Casagema to create this 1903 painting of an impoverished blind beggar holding the title object.
Picasso painted The Old Guitarist during this phase of his work from 1901 to 1904 when he focused on depressing subjects and used a somber monochromatic color palette.

During the Blue Period, Picasso also painted a notable portrait of this man sometimes dubbed “the beer glass”. This man became Picasso’s full-time secretary and started the Picasso Museum in Barcelona by donating his personal collection.

During the Blue Period, Picasso also painted a notable portrait of this man sometimes dubbed "the beer glass". This man became Picasso's full-time secretary and started the Picasso Museum in Barcelona by donating his personal collection.

bonuses.leadin: X-rays of this painting show that the figure of a woman was painted under this work’s subject, whose head is bent to the left. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this painting, in which a white-haired figure plays the title instrument while sitting cross-legged.
The Old Guitarist is a painting from the Blue Period of this artist, who helped found cubism with Georges Braque.
One painting from Picasso’s Rose Period depicts a man of this profession wearing pink attire and blue boots. Popular portrait subjects of this profession include David Garrick and Sarah Siddons.
